messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: first_user_path
Attribute time_to_first_success: how much this reduces the time before a new user gets a meaningful successful run

A (copy_paste_quickstart): A five-minute quickstart with one request JSON, one command, one expected top-k output, and one short explanation of the receipt fields.

B (receipt_debugging_guide): A troubleshooting guide for cache misses, model refusals, cost estimates, non-convergence, and inconsistent pairwise judgments.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute, and how many times more? Use ratio=1 only for near ties; cap large gaps at 26. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","ratio":1.0,"confidence":0.0}.
